description: Premium fraud management tools including device data collection and risk decisions

device_data_collection.description: Collect device fingerprint data for fraud assessment
device_data_collection.output: dataCollectorInstance.deviceData — JSON string to send with transaction

server_integration.description: Pass deviceData in Transaction.sale() for fraud scoring

risk_decisions.description: Braintree evaluates risk and may reject transactions

gateway_rejected_reasons.avs_and_cvv: Both AVS and CVV checks failed

avs_responses.M: Match — street and postal code match
avs_responses.I: Not provided — address not provided for comparison
avs_responses.A: Partial — street matches, postal code doesn't

cvv_responses.U: Not verified — issuer doesn't support CVV

kount.description: Braintree integrates with Kount for advanced fraud detection
kount.note: Requires Kount enrollment through Braintree — contact Braintree support

best_practices: Always collect and send deviceData with every transaction
Configure AVS and CVV rules in Braintree Control Panel
Monitor gateway_rejected transactions for fraud patterns
Review flagged transactions in Braintree Control Panel
Use 3D Secure alongside fraud tools for layered protection
